genotype_or_zygosity: homozygous derived (all 3 albinos); 26/458 carried NW273KV; 3 homozygotes
phenotype: Oculocutaneous albinism (pale skin MI 20.7/22.4/23.8, nystagmus, photophobia, blonde hair, gray irides)
effect_or_association: CAUSAL for albinism. Per-allele (1st allele) effect -7.7 MI (p=2.2E-5, Table2); -7.744 MI (p=9.0E-7, App1-T5). Freq 0.03. HW albinism freq ~1/1000 matches observed 3/~3000
population: Kalinago (Dominica); admixed ~55% Native American, ~32% African, ~12% European
source_table: Main Table 1; Table 2; Appendix 1-table 5; text p7-9,11-12
note: Novel albinism allele; 1KGP calls it 4 consecutive SNPs rs549973474/rs569395077/rs538385900/rs558126113

genotype_or_zygosity: 60/458 carried; homozygotes present (e.g. 3 R305W-hom individuals not albino)
phenotype: NOT albino despite homozygosity; one R305W-hom/NW273-ancestral individual had MI 72 (among darkest in population)
effect_or_association: NOT causal for skin color; scores INCORRECTLY as pathogenic by SIFT/Polyphen2.0/PANTHER; no detectable effect when controlling for NW273KV. Freq 0.068 (b37 pos 28260053). CADD 22.7
population: Kalinago (Dominica); admixed ~55% Native American, ~32% African, ~12% European
note: D1 evidence: predicted-pathogenic variant, phenotype ABSENT. Founder haplotype of NW273KV carries silent R305W

genotype_or_zygosity: derived allele freq 0.14; het & hom present
phenotype: hypopigmentation (skin lightening); dose-dependent (hom lighter than het)
effect_or_association: -5.8 MI/allele (p=1.5E-12, Table2); -5.757 MI (p=2.45E-16, App1-T5, b37 pos in App2). Only variant reaching genome-wide significance
population: Kalinago (Dominica); admixed ~55% Native American, ~32% African, ~12% European
note: European hypopigmenting allele; effect consistent with -5 (African-American), -5.5 (Cape Verde)

genotype_or_zygosity: derived allele freq 0.06; het & hom present
population: Kalinago (Dominica); admixed ~55% Native American, ~32% African, ~12% European
note: European hypopigmenting allele

population: Kalinago (Dominica); admixed ~55% Native American, ~32% African, ~12% European
note: non-genetic covariate

phenotype: lighter skin with increasing NAM ancestry (individuals ancestral at 3 loci, n=279)
effect_or_association: slope -24.3 MI per unit NAM (MI=-24.3*NAM+61.9; r2=0.2722). PC1 (NAM vs AFR) beta -62.14, p=5.73E-32 (App1-T5)
population: Kalinago (Dominica); admixed ~55% Native American, ~32% African, ~12% European
note: NAM ancestry reduces MI >20 units, but no single published NAM candidate allele explains it

population: exome candidate; chr4; f(AFR)=0.126
